createModal.advancedIntro: 請依監考與參與規範設定進階條件。
createModal.descCoding: Students focus on coding problems with existing submission and ranking flow.
createModal.descExam: Students answer on screen, essay questions can be graded by TAs.
createModal.endTimePlaceholder: Set start time and valid duration first
createModal.examModeHint: 啟用後將套用考試所需的監考與防作弊設定。
createModal.passwordHint: 啟用後，學生在加入或進入競賽時需輸入密碼。
createModal.rejoinHint: 啟用後，學生離開競賽後可再次加入。
createModal.scheduleIntro: 請填寫競賽基本資訊與應試時段。建立完成後，仍可於競賽管理頁面調整。
createModal.stepIntro: 請先選擇競賽類型並輸入名稱。建立後可於競賽設定頁面進一步調整時間與進階條件。
createModal.timeFormatExample: 請使用 12 小時制時間格式 HH:MM，並選擇上午或下午（例如 09:30 AM）。
createModal.typeCodingDesc: Coding problems with automatic submission and judging
createModal.typeExamDesc: Question types including True/False, Multiple Choice, and Essay

validation.durationPositive: Duration must be greater than 0 minutes

exam.antiCheatStarting: Anti-cheat monitoring will start after countdown
exam.anticheatConfigMissing: Anti-cheat policy has not loaded. Return to the dashboard and refresh before answering.
exam.autoSubmitNoMoreAnswer: After confirming, the system will auto-submit for you and you cannot answer anymore.
exam.autoSubmittedDesc: Screen sharing was interrupted and could not be restored within the time limit. Your exam has been automatically submitted.
exam.autoSubmittedHeading: Your exam has been automatically submitted
exam.autoSubmittedHint: If you believe this was an error, please contact your proctor.
exam.canViewButNoAnswer: You can view standings or submissions, but cannot continue answering
exam.displayApiDegraded: Display monitoring API is unavailable. The system may not detect multiple displays.
exam.doNotSwitchTabs: Do not switch tabs or leave window
exam.examLocked: Your exam has been locked! Please contact the proctor.
exam.examUnlockedDesc: The proctor has lifted your lock. Click "Continue Exam" to resume answering.
exam.followRulesReminder: Reminder: Please follow exam rules to avoid being locked again.
exam.forceSubmitCountdown: Auto-submit after 3 minutes of being locked
exam.forceSubmittedReason: Locked for over 3 minutes, system auto-submitted
exam.fullscreenRecoveryDesc: Return to fullscreen within {{seconds}} seconds, or this will count as one violation.
exam.leaveFullscreenWillSubmit: Leaving fullscreen in cheat detection mode will be treated as submission.
exam.monitoringDeviceUnsupported: This device does not meet the monitoring policy for this exam. Return to the dashboard and run the environment check again.
exam.mouseLeaveRecoveryDesc: Move your mouse back into the exam window within {{seconds}} seconds, or this will count as one violation.
exam.multiDisplayRecoveryDesc: Disconnect external displays within {{seconds}} seconds, or this will count as one violation.
exam.multipleDisplaysDetected: Multiple displays detected. Please keep only one physical screen.
exam.screenShareUnsupported: This browser does not support screen sharing. Return to the dashboard and run the environment check again, or use a browser that supports screen sharing.
exam.webcamUnsupported: This device cannot use the webcam. Return to the dashboard and run the environment check again, or use a device with webcam access.
exam.screenShareLostDesc: Screen sharing is required for exam monitoring. Please reshare your entire screen immediately, or the system will auto-submit your exam.
exam.screenShareTimeoutWarning: Failing to reshare in time will auto-submit your exam. This cannot be undone!
exam.stayInExamPage: Please stay on the exam page and maintain fullscreen mode.

submitProgress.failed: Submission flow failed. Please try again.
submitProgress.hint: Please keep this window open while submission is in progress.
submitProgress.title: Submitting Exam

exam.tabHiddenRecoveryDesc: Return to the exam tab within {{seconds}} seconds, or this will count as one violation.
exam.warningTimeoutLock: Warning not acknowledged in time, auto-locked
exam.windowBlurRecoveryDesc: Return to the exam window within {{seconds}} seconds, or this will count as one violation.
exam.zeroChanceWarning: If remaining chances reach zero, you will be auto-locked!

errors.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support display management. Please use Chrome or Edge.
errors.focusFailed: Please switch back to this page and try again.
errors.fullscreenFailed: Unable to enter fullscreen. Please grant permission and try again.
errors.fullscreenTimeout: Fullscreen check timed out. Please try again.
errors.interactionFailed: No recent interaction detected. Click the page or press any key.
errors.multiMonitor: Detected multiple displays ({{count}}). Please disconnect external monitors.
errors.noScreenDetails: Unable to confirm display count. Please retry the environment check.
errors.notMonitor: You must share your 'Entire Screen'. Sharing windows or tabs is not permitted.

errors.sharingInterrupted: Screen sharing interrupted. Please complete the check again.

requirements.browser: Use latest Google Chrome or Microsoft Edge.
requirements.display: Single physical monitor required; disconnect external displays.
requirements.permission: Grant "Window and Display Management" permission when prompted.
requirements.sharing: Please choose "Entire Screen" for screen sharing.
requirements.title: Environment Requirements:

instruction.autoSave: Your answers are auto-saved in real time — no manual saving needed.
instruction.autoSubmit: The exam will be auto-submitted when time is up.
instruction.blockedActions: Copy, paste, right-click menu, and certain shortcuts (e.g. new tab, refresh) are disabled.
instruction.keepFullscreen: Stay in fullscreen at all times; exiting triggers a countdown warning and counts as a violation.
instruction.keepPwaMode: On iPad, use the home-screen PWA throughout the exam; leaving counts as a violation.
instruction.monitoringActive: If screen sharing or webcam is interrupted, a countdown warning starts — failure to restore will auto-submit your exam.
instruction.noSwitch: Switching tabs, losing window focus, or moving the mouse outside the window are all violations — recorded in real time.
instruction.title: Exam Rules

precheck.title: Exam Pre-check

detectors.focusDesc: Leaving the exam window will be recorded as a violation

detectors.mouseLeaveDesc: Trigger warning when the mouse leaves the exam window area
detectors.multiDisplayDesc: Prevent using a second physical monitor during the exam
detectors.pwaModeDesc: Force execution in independent app mode to lock the system environment
detectors.tabVisibilityDesc: Prevent switching browser tabs or minimizing the window
detectors.viewportIntegrityDesc: Prevent iPad from using split-screen, slide-over, or small window modes

anticheat.screenShareDesc: Capture student screen as monitoring evidence
anticheat.webcamDesc: Capture student webcam as monitoring evidence

settings.archiveDesc: Once archived, the contest will become read-only and cannot be activated again.
settings.confirmArchive: Are you sure you want to archive this contest?
settings.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this contest? This action cannot be undone!
settings.deleteDesc: This action cannot be undone. All related data (including submissions and rankings) will be permanently deleted.
settings.exportResultsDesc: Export contest results as CSV file, including rank, account, solved problems, total score, and problem status.
settings.publishToPracticeConfirmDesc: This will clone all contest problems into the public practice library for Labs. The archived contest stays read-only.
settings.publishToPracticeDesc: Available after archiving. Copies all contest problems to the public practice library for Labs.
settings.requiresPasswordHelp: When enabled, students must enter a password to join.
settings.showDuringContestHelp: Allow participants to view live scoreboard during contest
